title: cherleria rupestris
intro: Cherleria rupestris, also known as alpine rockrose, is a perennial alpine plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cherleria rupestris include reducing inflammation, promoting skin healing, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically made from its flowers and leaves, can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
